subject: rt_c_v_regs.c Tier-2 fixture + cmake/run_e2e wiring
description: Step 5 (behavioral): new C fixture using __riscv_vle32/vadd/vse32 intrinsics. Phase A seeds v0..v15 via vle in QEMU1; Phase B mutates in vsim; Phase C verifies in QEMU2. Build with -march=rv64gcv. Add to Makefile, HybridConfig.cmake (Tier-2 list), run_e2e.sh REQUIRED_ELFS + RT_TESTS. Cross-product (csr+pc) must PASS.
